name: Oysters En Brochette
recipeInstructions:
1. Alternate the oysters and bacon on six separate skewers, ensuring that the skewers pass through the firm part of the oysters.
2. Place the skewers across a deep baking pan so that the oysters hang down without touching the bottom of the pan.
3. Bake in a very hot oven at 475°F until the bacon is crisp, which should take about 5 minutes.
4. Place one skewer on each slice of toast and pour juice over them.
5. Serves 6 people.
